retry_reason: The put operation always succeeds when the pointer is non-NULL; no failure mode exists that would warrant a retry.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that decrements the reference count of a calipso_doi object. If the count drops to zero, it invalidates the CALIPSO cache and schedules an RCU callback to free the object. The function is safe to call with a NULL pointer (no-op). After calling, the caller must not use the object unless it holds another reference. No return value to check; the caller releases ownership of one reference.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release a reference to a calipso_doi object; the only additional logic is the necessary destruction sequence (cache invalidate and RCU free) when the refcount reaches zero. No unrelated business logic.
